name: Delegator Agent Toolkit
description: Intent-based delegation system using ERC-7715 and MetaMask Delegation Framework. Humans grant agents limited, revocable permissions; agents can sub-delegate with tighter constraints. Includes onchain registry (DelegatorAgent.sol) and TypeScript client. Designed for safe autonomous AI agents onchain.

capabilityManifest.description: Onchain registry storing delegations with constraints (targets, selectors, value caps, expiry, intentHash). Supports createDelegation, createSubDelegation, execute, revoke, verifyCall, getChildren.
Offchain preflight checks and safe execution using viem.

safetyGuardrails: All delegation constraints enforced onchain before execution
Sub-delegations cannot exceed parent's value cap or expand target/selector sets
Selector required if allowedSelectors non-empty; calldata short (less than 4 bytes) reverts
Delegation expiry checked; expired delegations are unusable

autonomyLoop.discover: Human creates root delegation with high-level intent (intentHash).
autonomyLoop.plan: Agent selects appropriate targets/selectors within constraints and may issue sub-delegations for sub-agents.
autonomyLoop.execute: Agent (or relayer) calls DelegatorAgent.execute with valid parameters; contract enforces constraints.
autonomyLoop.verify: DelegatorAgent.verifyCall provides offchain verification; CallExecuted event records onchain outcome.
autonomyLoop.submit: Agent logs results and emits events; human can audit via logs and blockchain explorer.
